raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, I was charged by XXXX XXXX XXXX, a home appliance repair company ( AHS ) {$49.00} and {$29.00} as a monthly service fees. I called AHS and complained that I was charged twice. They immediately admitted and told me that it should be only {$29.00} and promised me to refund me {$49.00}. However, I didn't see this refund on my next statement, therefore, I called Citi credit card XXXX and they insisted first that it was the legitimate transaction as the merchant submitted the legitimate information and they did not issue me a refund. Then I sent them a copy of the email sent from XXXX stating that they had already issued me a refund ( its email is attached ). They say " Please be aware that {$49.00} already credited to her account '' on XX/XX/XXXX, but this time Citi credit card said they never received the refund from XXXX. 
As Citi Credit card XXXX requested their supporting document, I sent them AHS 's payment ID and the time when AHS refunded my money ( documents attached ). Nevertheless, Citi XXXX sent me the exact same letter as the one they sent me before I submitted all the required document and refused to pay me back {$49.00} and still refused me a refund. 
I have been caught between Citi Credit card XXXX and the merchant and this problem has been going on since XXXX, XXXX and just going no where. What I really want is the direct talk between Citi credit card company and AHS, then the issue would be resolved immediately. I believe either Citi card or AHS is not telling me the truth and I truly appreciate your intervention into this matter. 

Truly yours, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
